title: 2 or 3 inch Nerv logo Sticker
wikitext:
[]: 2 or 3 inch Nerv logo Sticker?             Quote Post by zuka » Fri Jul 08, 2011 8:19 pm Hey guys I'm getting a Macbook Air in a few weeks and I want to cover up the illuminated apple logo on the case. I bought it cause it was cheaper than the thin and light windows notebooks, not because I want to be a walking, glowing brand advertisement. What better way to cover it than with a NERV logo? Problem is, I can't find any that are small enough to not be enormous. Most of the ones I've seen are car sized at around 6 to 10 inches, and I'd be looking for one around 2 or 3. Does anyone know of any? Black'd be preferable, but any color's okay Cheers, zuka

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Fri Jul 08, 2011 9:46 pm you could get a hard clamshell case for it,(and put the nerv logo on the case but not the laptop itself) those from incase or iskin or something like that, however i would just keep the macbook air as it is u could make one urself too, heh

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Sat Jul 09, 2011 8:11 pm It's not my business, but I wouldn't suggest the macbook air. :P the MBP costs something similar, and it's better in basically every way. Even battery life. As for your question, you might also be underestimating just how bright the logo gets. If it's dark all you can see is the apple. As for the sticker, I THINK you could get one made at a print shop like kinko's or something.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Jul 09, 2011 10:15 pm I don't know how bright the apple logos are, I have a HP and it's logo is pretty bright, but in all likely hood the light would just shine through the sticker.

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Sat Jul 09, 2011 10:20 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: I don't know how bright the apple logos are, I have a HP and it's logo is pretty bright, but in all likely hood the light would just shine through the sticker.

[]:             Quote Post by resetter » Sun Nov 13, 2011 11:02 am Hi there, i have a little hobby making car decals, i can make small ones as well, but indeed you`ll have the apple led underneath shining though, but i can counter that by added 2 layers of vinyls. You can either wrap the back with a satin/matt black wrapping film, or i could cut out the black to go under neath the red of the nerv logo, that way you get a black outline, but the light wont shine trough... (i can stick this film on a 1,5 watt led spotlight and it will only just go trough ever so slightly so an apple logo wouldn`t be a problem) However at that size you cant have the txt "gods in his heaven" as that will be to small to cut or have it stick on the laptop longer then 10 minutes :p

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sun Nov 13, 2011 11:33 am I wonder if there is some setting that controls the brightness of the logo.

[]:             Quote Post by resetter » Sun Nov 13, 2011 5:52 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: I wonder if there is some setting that controls the brightness of the logo.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sun Nov 13, 2011 6:28 pm resetter wrote: I dont use mac stuff i wont sell my soul to the devil ;) but i`d bet there is, i`ll go and make some screen shots of my new pc sidepannel with the nerv logo once i get it al wrapped up ;)

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Nov 14, 2011 3:18 pm Where can one get one of these of appropriate size for a MacBook Pro?

[]:             Quote Post by MandarinOrange » Mon Nov 14, 2011 3:35 pm You can also look on Etsy. I've seen some Eva computer decals on there before.

[]:             Quote Post by resetter » Mon Nov 14, 2011 5:40 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Where can one get one of these of appropriate size for a MacBook Pro?
